name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
Always second best

“User had to try three times harder just to catch up with the rest of the task force. And when they started falling for their lieutenant, they had to try five times as hard to get his attention. Apparently, that wasn’t enough.”

Younger!Pining!FTM!user X oblivious older Ghost.

He/Him pronouns used in intro. FWB ghoap if you squint?

Please leave reviews. Asking for fem pov will be blocked.

Edited to add anypov intro. First intro is ftmpov, second is anypov!
